nasb.text: So He declared to you His covenant which He commanded you to perform, that is, the Ten Commandments; and He wrote them on two tablets of stone.

esv.text: And he declared to you his covenant, which he commanded you to perform, that is, the Ten Commandments,  and he wrote them on two tablets of stone.

cnv.text: 把他的約，就是他吩咐你們遵守的那十條誡命，向你們宣布出來；又把它們寫在兩塊石版上。

ccb.text: 祂向你们宣告祂的约，就是祂吩咐你们遵守的十诫，并写在两块石版上。
